title: Remove Map.put changeset mutation, use put_change/3
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/user_edit_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.UserEditLive). Its handle_event("validate", %{"user" => params}, socket) must build a changeset via MyApp.Accounts.change_user(user, params), then use Ecto.Changeset.put_change/3 to force :updated_at to DateTime.utc_now(). It MUST NOT use Map.put or Map.merge on a changeset. Build the form with to_form and action :validate. mount/3: assign :user as %MyApp.Accounts.User{} and :form as to_form(Accounts.change_user(user)).
tier_rationale: One known anti-pattern with one canonical replacement (put_change/3).
research_citation: John Elm Labs top-3 form mistakes #3
